Home / Docs / JVM Optimization Cheat Sheet

JVM Optimization Cheat Sheet

Quick-reference card for JVM tuning on OpenShift & Kubernetes. All flags verified on Red Hat UBI9 with Podman.

View on GitHub ↗
Container Heap Sizing GC Quick-Select GC Defaults by Image Thread Count Tuning Startup Optimization Right-Sizing Quick Reference HPA Configuration Prometheus Metrics Low-Latency Ladder Panama FFM gRPC vs REST Podman Gotchas JVM Flags Cookbook Key Flags Reference AppCDS vs Leyden vs Native Health Check Endpoints
File location in repo
java-optimization-demos/JVM-OPTIMIZATION-CHEATSHEET.md
Quick start: The most impactful flags for any container deployment — -XX:+UseContainerSupport -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0 -XX:ParallelGCThreads=N where N equals your CPU request. That's 80% of the value in three flags.

Talk

Taming the JVM: Optimizing Java Workloads on OpenShift & Kubernetes

Quarkus 3.33.1 LTS  ·  Java 21 & 25

Based On

📗 Optimizing Cloud Native Java (O'Reilly)

📗 SRE with Java Microservices (O'Reilly)
